response:
Progress Report, Part II  
This report highlights the visual enhancements implemented during the game's redevelopment. Although we have successfully nearly doubled the frame rate by incorporating optimization features into the framework, the integration of new hardware-intensive functionalities, such as dynamic fluid particles and physics-based hair strands, introduces additional performance challenges. We aim to maintain a balanced approach to these advancements.  

Picture #1 illustrates the new belly bulge system. In the redeveloped game, each character possesses a specific stomach capacity that dictates the amount of "body fluid" they can accommodate within their womb, stomach, and bowels. For instance, Dr. Anya can hold up to 4000ml of sperm without overflowing, whereas Alet is limited to 2800ml. Male test subjects release varying amounts of semen during climax: a Dreamer typically expels approximately 10-15ml, while an Elder Thing delivers 400-600ml into their partner.  

Picture #2 and #3 present the new cum and love juice graphics. The fluid effects are not pre-designed for sex scenes but are triggered dynamically based on the character's sensitivity, ecstasy level, and stamina. Certain character perks, obtained through experimentation with specific test subjects, may increase the likelihood of urinary incontinence or excessive squirting.  

Picture #4 and #5 showcase dynamic body interactions and skin decals in VR, with hands moving through a VR controller.  

Pictures #6, #7, and #8 offer previews of upcoming bondage devices and cooperative sex scenarios. More details will be released in the coming months.  

The May Monthly Poll and returning costume bundle will be available in a few hours.
